rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Banned words — grep zero-tolerance.
Ritual / practice (as noun) / ceremony — hard ban
No stale markers, no
retrospectives, no session biography.
Register match.
Credit the original when paraphrasing a named technique.
Always "you", never "the student"; teacher framing stays out of body.
Don't smuggle terms of art from maintainer into body.
Over-hedge detector.
Punchy framing keeps its punch; carve-out lives downstream.
Value-prop / positioning framing belongs in sales copy + project-level strategy docs, NOT in student-facing curriculum body.
Watch out for planting jargon too early.
Aspirational destination, never corrective gap.
Earn every technical term on first use.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Line 5: 'Two packaged-lens reports' uses 'packaged-lens' without prior definition. Line 6: 'One residual decision' uses 'residual' without prior definition. Both are technical terms requiring one-breath primers before first use.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Add primers before line 5: define 'packaged lens' as 'a reusable skill-based check bundled with specific rules.' For 'residual,' add before line 6 or integrate into Phase 2-3 context: 'a risk that remains after mitigation.'

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Business-audience word ban (Agents 101 default).
Memory vs context — use deliberately.
Golden path only in the body.
Trust Claude's defaults for structure.
Don't smuggle another module's voice.
Don't ask the student to manually diff or spot-check Claude's output as error-catching.
No "What research says" callout boxes
Student moves stay in conversation with the agent.
Specify which CLAUDE.md layer — every time.
No em-dashes. Simple sentences.
Section headers use command verbs when the section is about doing something.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Line 54: **Phase 2. Run the policy audit.** (verb lead confirmed). Line 81: **Phase 3. Run the agent-risk audit.** (verb lead confirmed). Both fixes from previous run verified in place. Phases 1 and 4 already verb-led.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Disambiguate shared-word collisions with Claude Code primitives on first student-authored use.
LLM-vs-agent-vs-Claude vocabulary discipline.
No time-of-day anchors in body prose.
Reflection beats stay invisible in the flow.
No meta-ask when the student has already decided.
`.md` is the default file type for student artifacts across the curriculum.
Cut NVA: true but not moving the student forward.
No placeholders inside fenced blocks.
Every prompt block gets a one-sentence action lead-in.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Line 58-60: Phase 2 prompt lacks action lead-in before **Prompt** label. Line 85-86: Phase 3 prompt lacks action lead-in. Line 109-111: Phase 4 prompt lacks lead-in AND lacks **Prompt** label before fence.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Phase 2 (line 58): Add lead-in like 'Ask Claude to apply the policy lens to your Module 3 system and produce a report.' Phase 3 (line 85): Add lead-in like 'Ask Claude to apply the agent-security lens, analyze access control and named risk patterns, and produce a ranked report.' Phase 4 (line 109): Add lead-in and **Prompt** *(Claude Code)* label with blank line before fence.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Canonical presentation shape — lead-in, label with destination, blank line, fenced block.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Phase 4 (line 111): Fence appears with no **Prompt** label or lead-in above it. The label is missing entirely; the fence begins immediately after descriptive text.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Add **Prompt** *(Claude Code)* label and blank line before the fence at line 111.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Installed Claude Code Skills invoke by name, never by path.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Line 50: '/security-audit' invoked by skill name, not path.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Chain prompts by back-reference and deterministic path, never by invented alias.
Chained-prompt isolation — don't leak the downstream pipeline.
Prompt-chain context preservation — no session-resets mid-phase.
Mood contract named.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Line 101: 'The uncomfortable feeling is the evidence.' honors the Module 4 deepened-unease mood contract.

notes: Previous run flagged rule 17 (verb-led headers) at lines 54 and 81. Both fixes verified as in place. New blocking violations in this run: (1) check_student_facing.md rule 2 — two unearned technical terms ('packaged-lens' at line 5, 'residual' at line 6); (2) check_prompts.md rule 2 — three missing action lead-ins (lines 58, 85, 109); (3) check_prompts.md rule 3 — Phase 4 prompt missing **Prompt** label. Procedural boundaries: MAINTAINER_CUT at line 141; FENCE_RANGES at 23-30, 60-75, 86-97, 111-119; body region 1-140 excluding fences.
